reviews.comment: Such a good experience, I learned a lot of information that I did not know from previous classes! I will definitely go back to re-certify. If you go, use code “Teagan” 🥰

reviewReply.comment:

Don't forget who sent you:  "Teagan" in the Promo Code during registration.  It's worth remembering!
